warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Pass Throughs
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
Banded Lat Stretch
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squat
5e/s Squat Knee Taps
10 Broad Jump
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
3 Full Clean

strength.name: Tall Clean
strength.description:
1x3 | *From Triple Extension, drop under the bar
*Fast Elbows | Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3

strength.name: Clean Pull
strength.description:
1x3 | * 3 count to knee
* Focus on hip pop & Triple Extension
* Shrug and let elbows float | Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
06:00 3
08:00 3
10:00 3

strength.name: Clean
strength.description:
2x2 | * If you catch high, squat it
* Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | 24min
BUILD 4 Sets E3MOM
00:00 3 @ 60%
03:00 3 @ 70%
06:00 2 @ 80%
09:00 2 @ 85-90%
HOLD 2 Sets E4MOM
12:00 2 @ 95%
16:00 2 @ 95%

metcon.name: Heavy. Fran
metcon.description:
15-12-9
Thrusters @ 61/43
Weighted Pull Ups @ Weight Vest/Plate/KB/DB 2@ 20/15
Scale unweighted/Ring Rows
Scale Thrusters to 43/29 - keep reps the same.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today taxed anterior chain heavily; build posterior chain and arm hypertrophy without competing with fatigue.

1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener

5 PVC Around the Worlds each way

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Tall Clean, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Metcon: Heavy. Fran. Workout: 15-12-9, Scale unweighted/Ring Rows. For hypertrophy, focus on back (rows), biceps, rear delts.
